title: Wham Studio Basket 4.02 - Color: White
features: This Wham storage basket is perfect for multi-purpose storage. Use it for storing bathroom toiletries, cleaning and laundry products, kitchen products, stationery and toys.

This sleek versatile box is available in a range of colours to suit your preference and has useful handles making it easy to transport, it is approximately 3.9 Litres for storing plenty of accessories and keeping your space tidy.
Handles for easy carrying Suitable for home storage Approximately 3.9L Approximate dimensions (mm) H 110 W 250 D 170
